# GEM-pRF Configuration Archive

Source URL: https://gemprf.github.io/gemprf-configs/list-configs-archive.html

# GEMpRF Config Archive

Available sample configuration files for older releases of GEM-pRF, hosted at
`/assets/gemprf_config/config-archive/`. The archive page lists each
versioned XML for download.

Currently archived versions:

- v0.1.10 — `v0.1.10_sample_config.xml`
- v0.1.11 — `v0.1.11_sample_config.xml`

Each entry is a self-contained XML config that documents the parameter
shape used by that release. Mirrored locally under
`external/docs/gemprf-configs/config-archive/`.
